summary: A small but strategically pivotal state hosting NATO HQ and EU institutions in Brussels, with deep linguistic and political divisions between Dutch-speaking Flanders and French-speaking Wallonia.

history.detail: King Leopold II personally owns Congo; brutal exploitation kills millions.
Germany invades; Belgium's resistance brings UK into war.
Co-founds European Economic Community; Brussels becomes EU capital.

history.event: NATO HQ moves to Brussels permanently

leverage_tools: Diamond trade hub (Antwerp — 80% of world diamonds)

tech_startups.vc_ecosystem: Small; strong biotech around KU Leuven

resources.nuclear: 50% of electricity from nuclear; major political debate on extension
resources.agriculture: Specialty foods: chocolate, beer, endive, fries

follow_the_money.detail: 80% of world's rough diamonds traded through Antwerp; also historically used for sanctions evasion
€200B+/yr EU budget administered from Brussels institutions
